html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Right now, Edith is in the peak phase—shedding feels heavy, but that means the cycle is turning over. Short nights and late caffeine have likely nudged her body clock out of sync, and this protocol steadies that rhythm. It reinforces deep, regular sleep and gentle stress resets to calm the system from inside out. Step by step, this moves her from peak toward stabilization—so shedding eases, strength returns, and the next growth wave has room to shine. 🌱

Start today—each night of steady rest speeds your shift toward regrowth.
